subject: docs(claude): add development phase note to AI Notes
body:
App is pre-release with zero users. AI assistants should not
over-polish or push back on feature ideas based on user need —
the goal is exploration and everything is provisional.

Tags: docs, ai-notes, process
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dev-process
Semver: patch
